name: broken-switch
config_text:
hostname broken
interface Gi1/0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 999

name: good-switch
config_text:
hostname good
vlan 10
 name STAFF
interface Gi1/0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 spanning-tree portfast
 spanning-tree bpduguard enable
